_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of binary analysis tools and techniques
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of Linux operating system fundamentals relevant to data engineering, including file system structure, process management, user and permission models, package management, and common command-line utilities for text processing and system monitoring.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI TF domain. Knowledge TF-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-K-006 (AB, cosine: 0.464), DQ-K-006 (DQ, cosine: 0.438).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: Weak similarity (3.4/10). Limited semantic overlap detected. The relationship exists but the concepts diverge significantly in scope or application domain.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: Moderate token-level alignment (F1=0.873). Precision exceeds Recall (P=0.900 > R=0.847), indicating the NICE element's semantic content is more tightly aligned with the KSA than the reverse.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: Neutral-dominant (93.1%). The model finds the descriptions related but neither implying nor contradicting each other — typical for cross-domain framework mapping where concepts overlap without strict logical implication.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder (0.513) exceeds STS (0.343). The independent embeddings find more similarity than cross-attention, suggesting surface-level vocabulary overlap exceeds the deeper semantic relationship.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Low lexical overlap (9.4%). Limited shared vocabulary — the relationship is primarily semantic rather than terminological.
